n86_4_bugs_status.bug_1_wmma_load_state_space: FIXED — state-space `.global` now precedes element-type for both wmma.load.a and wmma.load.b (compiler/codegen/nvptx_target.hexa lines 4683, 4694)

n86_4_bugs_status.bug_4_addressing_layout: FIXED — canonical matmul now uses row-major B (nn.Linear convention) with `.row.row` mma layout. NT_a switches to `.col.row` (A col-major + B row-major), NT_b switches to `.row.col` (A row-major + B col-major)
